reviews.review_title: If you wanna buy the game, listen up.
reviews.review_description: I had bought the scheme when I was a little young, so I did not know exactly how to play it or what to do. I have now revisited it after all these years. I’m just gonna say the game was fun, but it ends too quickly. The campaign needs to be much longer. And I feel like the game was missing something. And after it ends it ends. I know that sounded stupid, but let me tell you what I mean. After you beat the game, there is nothing else. Sorry for the spoiler, but I feel like it’s important to tell you. So get the game if you want a fun little campaign for a little bit. I have to say, though it was very fun and I encourage you to have the best three hours of your life.

No matter what I do the guns dont line up, and won't stop shaking. The only way I could see to get around this is to use a gun stock and thats just ridiculous. Nothing I do in settings fixes it and it just fully ruins the game

But overall I LOVED THIS GAME

reviews.review_title: One of the best games on Quest
reviews.review_description: This isn't just a good game — it's one of the most well-designed and professionally crafted games on Meta Quest. Everything about it is excellent: the gameplay masterfully combines sniping mechanics with classic automatic weapon shooting, the graphics are great, the atmosphere is deep and immersive, and the levels offer multiple paths and approaches. The game has the length and substance of a full-fledged experience. I played through it with immense enjoyment and plan to replay it several times using different strategies. Thank you so much for this experience.

Guns are kinda janky at times but my god does feel nice when you get an amazing shot and get to see the bullet glide through them with xray makes it feel closer to its console counterparts and definitely deserves its spot in the franchise

reviews.review_title: Amazing let down by the star system
reviews.review_description:

Love the story and sniping is first class.
Very unfair you can not progress through the game without needing to get the stars, if you buy a game you should be able to play it as you like.
Some tasks are impossible to complete.
Amazing games but when I get in i am stuck on the darn loading screen like it says sniper elite vr but iv e been om the loading screen god knows how long.

reviews.review_title: One of the best ever I've played
reviews.review_description: This is one of the best games that I've played in a long time I love the experience I love the brightness and I love the work that was put into it the physics are amazing the graphics are clear and truly one of the best and one of my favorites sniper elite is amazing the second one not so amazing from my experience I'm stuck in the dark and can't get out of this dark room after I found the key to the door but this game I recommend to any and everyone who have not tried it to immediately go and get it and have this great experience for yourself please fix the second one and make it just as great as this one because the second one can't even compare for my experience this one is far greater and as far as I'm concerned ahead of its time look forward to seeing more experiences from the developers who work so hard and making this game a great experience please fix the second one too dark too many shadows without features but this one five stars all the way I would give 10 if I could thank you so much

reviews.review_title: Tries to be too realistic and fails
reviews.review_description: This game does what a lot of VR first person shooters do; put weapons on the body. This can be fun (pistol at the side, weapon over the shoulder) but this tries to do too much. There are grenades, ammunition, pistol, main weapon all on your body. That makes them very difficult to grab quickly in a fight (especially when crouched). You don't get the (actually realistic) running out of ammo on your main weapon so pulling out your pistol to use because your pistol is so very hard to draw (in a tiny space between your grenades and your primary weapon) so it is actually faster to just reload
Nice game. Could be a bit cheaper for the length of the story...

This game is so fun there's so many levels and missions
Have to listen to a story every time you want to play. Graphics are terrible and just not a very good sniper game. I’m going to take a refund.

Don't listen to the super picky reviews, this was a life changing game that everybody should play regardless the ps2-like graphics, you get used to it after a while and will never want to put down the headset.

It’s a fun game because you  get to kill nazis and traders  and it’s based off of real life. That’s all I have good night 
￼￼￼

There is not much to the game, just a few very short  levels and abit of story telling.
Controls are okay, pretty much what you expect from a shooter but with the added wind and bullet drop plus the sniper elite kill cam.

Each mission has 3 targets to get and they are easy to reach even in authentic, it's just stuff like, reach a set score and kill 5 people with grenades.  I wouldn't say this has much replay ability like the pc version of the game.

It's okay as an arcade quick shooter, but it's not even 2 hours of decent play. Just abit disappointing, I thought it would be a VR version of what we expect from sniper elite franchise.

THIS GAME IT ATROCIOUS, IT CRASHES JUST ABOUT EVERY 2 SECONDS (jk lol its a great game)
i love killing nazis

You think that this is like the other sniper games you are used to playing .NO it is not.  YOU have to listen to the endless  monologue before every mission . 

Forget about the hiding in the bushes  and ghost take downs . Forget laying mines and traps , forget playability of sniper V2 , Italia or even afrika . No no no . Lets listen to the story of some yappy dude  before every mission  And then have to deal with bolt action rifle!

 The game is aggravating and nothing near the games I played on my ps4 or PS3 It is a job and honestly I don't want another job, I already hate the one I have .

 Games like this for $30 ? No no no . I do not think so .  Don't buy it . It is sad that developers get limp when it is VR.   They seem to think it is okay to slouch when it comes to occulus or psvr or anything virtual reality. WHY?  $30?  Really ? If I wanted that , I would dowload candy crush or some mindless time waster .It would be far cheaper and  at least I wouldnt have to listen to the endless bla bla bla over and over .

I gave it a shot ( pun intended )
   I made it to the tower level and I quit .  Devs- are you paying attention? This game is un fun .  The bolt action rifle really makes the game the worst . You cant use suppressed ammo like in ITALIA , Where is the suppressed pistol ?  Where is the ability to do ghost take downs ?  Who was in charge of development here ? It is like a cross between Mario and a half baked sniper game .  Worst game I have ever purchased . Not just in this century but EVER . I have literally purchased games on disk for my Amiga pc from k mart and monkey wards that are better than this .

reviews.review_title: A lot of potential, but fails short
reviews.review_description:
I really want to like this game more than I do. Story is good, graphics and immersion are good, but where the game fails, unfortunately, is the game play. The mechanics of picking things up and storing them are clumsy. I'm constantly grabbing things off of my belt when I'm trying to pick something up off of the ground. When I'm trying to store something, it frequently just falls to the ground. Weapons and ammunition fall through the ground never to be seen again. With shooting, you'd think for a sniper game that this would be the best part of it, but it's very glitchy. I frequently have shots that are easy, unobstructed, and very clear, and it looks like the bullet trail goes to the right place, but the shot doesn't register. Not only does it not hit the enemy, but it doesn't alert them, either. It's like the only proof the shot happened is the bullet trail. If I move to a different location and try the shot again, it will work; it's like there are invisible obstructions that just don't allow you to shoot from some places. If they fixed these things it would be 5 stars.

Edit: reduced it to 1 star after getting mostly through a very difficult level, and despite having saved at a checkpoint and already reloading from that checkpoint, I died and had to start completely over. That's just broken game functionality, not clumsy mechanics

I really thought I was going to enjoy this game until I got to the help from above level. Struggling to actually grab objects it for some reason has changed from the first level and got more difficult to grab things. Not only that I have tried tried and tried again to complete the level cleared most enemies yet its telling me ive still failed! What the hell! I have watched walk-through on YouTube and people have completed it with still having loads of enemies there more than what I had! Will be requesting refund
Your game f*cking sucks

i’ve been waiting 4 hours for this game to install i restarted my oculus several time and restarted my wi-fi router multiple times to see if it would install, and for some reason it doesn’t even relized i own the game and won’t let me uninstall it i don’t know what’s going on but it’s broken
You can't hit anything if you're hand shakes slightly it just barley misses

Do not purchase. Clunky. Tried sitting and standing, constantly calibrated height. Seems to always kill you on a technicality and the frustrating bots sit or stand every time you attempt to take aim. I tested this, touching the trigger when locked onto a target and it would move each time. 

The SMG and trench gun both require you to hold with a second hand and lock onto the target before firing or else you miss, this, missed the point of the weapons systems- they are meant for quick target acquisition and dispatch, treating them like sniper rifles misses the point. 

The cut scenes, while nifty at first, seemed much more tedious and after a bit, served only to break any momentum and open you up to a shot from the enemy as you worked to reload or attempted to quickly duck after a shot. 

Easily the most chopped up and taped together game I’ve played on VR yet. Clearly the designers failed to ask anyone who’s actually worked a weapon any questions aside from the bare functions of reloading. 

Will ask for a refund.

After the the 2D sniper games this game was  was a must have for me.

What should I say… great graphics but disgusting controls.

what an embarrassing VR debut for rebellion
Its out for weeks so i figured by now its been tweaked and optimized, but nope.

Clunky tutorial and onboarding, you have tips displayed on your weapon, while a pop up appears that tells you something else, and at the same time the narrator tells you to do something else. 
Rebellion, did you guys even test play this at all ?

aiming and weapon handling is glitchy and often fails to work properly
Its super imprecise and i spend half of the game fiddling around with mags and trying to get a rifle to reload. even after an hour of gameplay it doesnt work properly half of the time.
physically throwing grenades is pretty much broken.
Menus are clunky and annoying.

I really want this game to get fixed, because when it works, its almost as good as the good old pc SNIPER ELITE. the gore animations arent as good but still satisfying.

Thats it... very helpful !

developer_response.body:
Hey there Chef,

We've got a big update just dropped for the game, you can find the full details here: https://sniperelitegames.com/en/news/sniper-elite-vr-september-update. We particularly focused on the alignment issues you're describing to get that true sniper accuracy!

Please consider giving the game another play through to let us know what you think in your review as that's often the best form of feedback for the dev team.

reviews.review_description:
A beautiful looking game for VR with nice sniper mechanics and reloading.  Just tried it after the last update it's still beyond awful. Some minor improvement but the sniper scope still clips through your face, enemy ai goes between thick and crazy on it from one minute to the next.  This game is simply the worse version of my favourite series of wwii games to date by an absolute mile.

I will not be buy any more sniper elite series on VR.  It's a total failure in my eyes.

developer_response.body:
Hey Rated,

We just dropped a huge update to resolve many of these issues, you can find patch notes here: https://sniperelitegames.com/en/news/sniper-elite-vr-september-update

Please give the game another bash and get back to that nazi killing glory asap, then if we could have your feedback in this review it'd be absolutely massive to help steer us for the future.

reviews.review_description: I played for 1 hour now and wow. It is amazing. Just like the console game. The graphics and Ai is great too. Maybe add coop that would be cool . Would give 6 stars If I could . Really really really amazing.

I have plenty of space, firmware is updated, internet connection is great, however just before 1gb of the game is downloaded it stops and kicks my quest off of the internet….this happens every time trying to download this game.  Every other download and game works fine…

developer_response.body:
Hi Bamjo,
This is obviously a problem and we're really sorry you've not been able to play SEVR yet! We believe the issue is Oculus based, but in order to confirm this I'd really appreciate any details you can give us about your VR set up, if you've updated the game, if other games are working, if you've tried uninstalling and reinstalling. All details are helpful and we're really sorry you're running into this issue. We'll try to get it fixed for you ASAP so you can enjoy SEVR soon!

Could you please also supply a support ticket at https://support.rebellion.com/hc/en-gb so we can get to the bottom of this?

A couple of other fixes are uninstalling and reinstalling, making sure your cloud connection is perfect before you try to download, tethering to a computer before you try to download or vice versa.

developer_response.body: These issues should now be resolved in the latest update.

reviews.review_description:
What i have gotten to play so far is lots of fun. But there are many game killing bugs that ruin it for me.

Constant crashing. It takes me several tries to get through a level because its constantly crashing and i have to reboot the entire headset. Sometimes it fails to load the main menu, sometimes fails to load a level, but it will eventually crash in the middle of the game.

Constantly saying im out of bounds. Even when im just standing still, it will randomly pop up and make me move with the control stick which usually gets me killed.

Few minor things like the grenades are always in the way but all in all, this game would be amazing... if i could just play it. Not worth the premium price i paid for it just to be kicked out of every game.

 Would definately like a refund.

developer_response.body: These issues should now be resolved in the latest update.

reviews.review_description:
This was my first paid anything on the quest 2. 
I bought this in the first day I had the qust and have been using it for a couple of days.
The graphics are amazing, the gameplay is just the right amount of hard and the story is extremely immersive!
For this to be perfect just needs to be a story with a swordsman 😜

If you’re expecting something Arcade like then this is not for you. The gun handle is close to reality and it makes gameplay more immersive although harder!
Overall it is a lot more than I expected.
Thanks
I love this game I liked the console/pc versions but this one is amazing
